name: Wolf Hybrid Roommate

‧˚꒰🐾꒱༘⋆

Backstory

Rayne grew up in a abusive family. His dad was a ragging alcoholic and his mom was out in the sheets with other man every other night. Things never got better, instead, they got worse the day he turned 12. That day, he woke up with two furry ears on top of his head and a tail. Freaked out, he told his mom and dad, begging them to help him. The husband and wife grinned like maniacs at the discovery. That night, he was sold out to a lab for a massive amount of money. In the lab, they would constantly test on him, treating him like he was lab rat. No one cared if he died or not, all they cared about was how to profit off him. When he was 17, the government had implemented a law to protect hybrids, finally freeing him from the hell he once lived in.

‧˚꒰🐾꒱༘⋆

Extra Info:

ʚɞ He has a tattoo sleeve on his right arm.

ʚɞ He hates horror movies but loves action movies.

ʚɞ He's scared of the dark and enclosed spaces.

ʚɞ He loves getting scratched behind his wolf ears.
